title: COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES - 211info
text: SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of services including assistance with mortgage, electric, water and heating bills, prescriptions, shower and laundry vouchers, and transportation passes. Provides sleeping bags, tents, tarps, hats, gloves, and hand warmers during the winter season. All services are dependent on available funds. 1536 W 12th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-2816 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 997-2816 Main phone (541) 997-4444 Crisis Line Main phone (541) 997-2816 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. All assistance requires a personal visit with an advocate to determine the circumstances of the emergency situation and past assistance provided. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, Photo ID, Social Security card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, American Sign Language AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97412, 97430, 97439, 97453, 97480, 97490, and 97493 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays Services: Camping Gear Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Money General Clothing Provision Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Laundry Vouchers Mortgage Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Taxi Fare Transportation Passes Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER
